underlying_goal: Build a face comparison app that analyzes similarity between kids' and parents' facial features with accurate scoring and a beautiful UI
friction_detail: Multiple iterations needed to fix model loading issues (MediaPipe migration failed, reverted to face-api.js, then a JS syntax error with unescaped apostrophe prevented the app from running at all).
brief_summary: User wanted a face similarity comparison app; it was built but required many debugging rounds to fix model loading failures and score alignment issues before working.
